known_gaps: Routing is now enabled and bounded placement retry legalizes the generated sensor, pull-up, decoupling, and connector placements, but inter-block route completion still blocks promotion.
Block-local route net names are rewritten to composed aliases so VCC/GND/SDA/SCL local route contact proof no longer fails on sensor_* instance-net mismatches.

Current route blockers are real route-completion/contact blockers: the router only partially routes the multi-endpoint VCC/GND/SDA/SCL nets and still reports missing or missed contact targets for the remaining sensor, connector, and pull-up/decoupling endpoints.
Project write, writer correctness, validation, and KiCad checks remain skipped until the routing stage emits complete same-net contact graph evidence for all required I2C breakout nets.
notes: Tracks the richer sensor breakout scenario after placement and block-local net-alias blockers; the remaining expected failure is multi-endpoint inter-block route completion.
